description: Jellycat, Known for its whimsical and fun plush toys for everyday use, introduces his fun plush toys. Treat yourself to your favourite snacks in soft, fluffy shape. From pretzels to croissants, each style is sold separately and features a smiling, amused expression. Perfect for ages 0 and up, these plush toys are hand wash only and do not tumble dry. Add them to your child's collection for an adorable touch.
features: Dimensions: Amuseables Pickle measures 3.1 x 5.9 x 1.6 inches. Sitting height is 2 inches.

Amuseables Pickle: Canners, connoisseurs, and snack lovers alike will relish Amuseables Pickle! Plump and green with all-over embroidered freckles, camel cord boots, and a silly stitched grin, this gleeful gherkin packs a smile into every picnic basket and brown-bag lunch.

Fun & Unique Design: Jellycat Amuseables bring the smiles! Made for collecting, these playful pals are perfect for foodies, sports fans, nature lovers, and holiday enthusiasts of all ages. Cute and quirky, they come in a variety of sizes and styles to brighten any room.

Premium Fabric: Our luxury plush toys are constructed with premium-grade, specially sourced materials that are noticeably softer, subtler, and longer-lasting. We then add thoughtful design elements, multi-layer construction, and hand-finished details.

Perfect For Gifting: From babies and toddlers to teens and adults, a Jellycat plush friend makes the perfect gift for celebrating a special event or milestone, sending get-well wishes, saying thank you, or simply letting someone know how special they are.

offers.conditionComment: collectible item. new with tags. tag may have price sticker residue

title: Jellycat Amuseables Pickle Stuffed Toy, 6 inches - Vegetable Plush - Fun Gift Idea
